destinations.evidence: The configured block verifier runs after transaction processing and before post-execution finalization; verifier errors return immediately and prevent finalization.

equivalence_argument: The nodebuilder executor gates finalization on the configured verifier in both execute_one and execute_one_with_state_hook.
rationale: The new executor adds a consensus verification phase before apply_post_execution_changes, maps verifier failures into BlockExecutionError, and build_evm_with_pool wires in a block verifier while build_evm without pool leaves it absent. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When a block verifier is configured, RitualBlockExecutor invokes verifier.verify_block on the sealed block after transaction execution and before post-execution finalization, and any verifier error aborts execution before state transitions are finalized.
suggested_falsification_tests: Run block execution with a mock verifier that records calls and succeeds, asserting verify_block is called after all transactions and before finalization. Then run with a verifier that returns an error and assert execute_one returns BlockExecutionError and does not call apply_post_execution_changes or merge state transitions.
summary: Configured block verification gates nodebuilder finalization.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Install a verifier that returns an error and assert execute_one returns BlockExecutionError before apply_post_execution_changes is called.
title: Configured block verifier gates finalization
